description: Color image, a text-only screenshot of two paragraphs of black serif body text on a white background, with no logos, photos, seals, slogans, or graphic-design styling. The text is an excerpt of a news profile reading: 'At just 23, Jacob Palmer is already running his own electrical company. He launched the business in 2024 after starting in the field as an apprentice electrician, a career path he embarked on when college turned out not to be for him.' and 'Palmer has no regrets about his decision to forego college and instead establish himself as a tradesman. "I am very happy doing what I am doing now because it has given me the opportunity to work for myself and be independent," he told CBS News.'
notable_text: At just 23, Jacob Palmer is already running his own electrical company... "I am very happy doing what I am doing now because it has given me the opportunity to work for myself and be independent," he told CBS News.
